name: claude-composed-app
title: Claude Canonical Desktop Shell (composed)
description: High against pass-100 claude-desktop chat/cowork/code pages (element rects and sampled surfaces pixel-match the claude-desktop captures per page and theme), pending sanitized live Claude full-shell capture. Canonical parameterized Claude desktop shell: data-page="chat|cowork|code" (default cowork), data-sidebar/data-rail on|off toggles, .theme-dark for dark; one file replaces the stacked claude-desktop pages while keeping sidebar, thread, composer, and rail independently editable atoms. Capture variants: capture:claude-composed-app{,-chat,-code,-dark,-chat-dark}. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
